---
title: Week notes (2026-W20)
date: 2026-05-15
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Implementing some of the feedback on the emails analysis paper
- qc-atelier development
- Documenting and refactoring the code system
- Participated in the Dzau lecture

- Worked on the INKE-2026 presentation
- Started revamping work on BibVik over the weekend
- Enjoying the long weekend :)
